focus_intent: Resume turn continued. Shipped 2 more commits on the existing per-agent branch: (1) doctrine-audit gains a 6th counter `bareIconNoLabel` that flags icon-only Buttons missing aria-label + title (variant-agnostic, includes a regex lookbehind fix for arrow-fn attrs that also tightens existing pillRegression); (2) operator-flagged backend data-routing bug — for-use accounts were leaking into the /for-sale warehouse via a legacy `loginStatus=harvested` OR fallback in 4 predicates. Branch now 4 commits / 13 a11y fixes + 1 audit-rule extension + 1 backend data fix ahead of main. Pushed to origin. Operator merge-auth still required (CLAUDE.md rule #4).
